'''yashaba''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:coachweed|coachweed]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-sh-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:coachweed|coachweed]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| yashaba
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:yæshæbæth|yæshæbæth]] || [[word:yæshæbæj|yæshæbæj]] || [[word:yæshæbæsh|yæshæbæsh]] || [[word:yæshæbæ|yæshæbæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:yashashabath|yashashabath]] || [[word:yashashabaj|yashashabaj]] || [[word:yashashabash|yashashabash]] || [[word:yashashaba|yashashaba]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:yashabath|yashabath]] || [[word:yashabaj|yashabaj]] || [[word:yashabash|yashabash]] || [[word:yashaba|yashaba]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:yashafbath|yashafbath]] || [[word:yashafbaj|yashafbaj]] || [[word:yashafbash|yashafbash]] || [[word:yashafbaf|yashafbaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:yashabatha|yashabatha]] || [[word:yashabaja|yashabaja]] || [[word:yashabasha|yashabasha]] || [[word:yashabaka|yashabaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:yashabath|yashabath]] || [[word:yashabaj|yashabaj]] || [[word:yashabash|yashabash]] || [[word:yashaba|yashaba]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:yashabathal|yashabathal]] || [[word:yashabajal|yashabajal]] || [[word:yashabashal|yashabashal]] || [[word:yashabakal|yashabakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:yashabathatha|yashabathatha]] || [[word:yashabajaja|yashabajaja]] || [[word:yashabashasha|yashabashasha]] || [[word:yashabaka|yashabaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:yashabathan|yashabathan]] || [[word:yashabajan|yashabajan]] || [[word:yashabashan|yashabashan]] || [[word:yashabakan|yashabakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:yashabathaoro|yashabathaoro]] || [[word:yashabajaoro|yashabajaoro]] || [[word:yashabashaoro|yashabashaoro]] || [[word:yashabakaoro|yashabakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|bfc4f79}}
